title: microchilus schultesianus
intro: Microchilus schultesianus, also known as the Yellow Root or Schultesianus, is a plant species belonging to the family Apocynaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of alkaloids like schultesianine and schultesianine, which exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Microchilus schultesianus include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antiviral agent. Herbal preparations of Microchilus schultesianus often involve the roots, which can be dried, powdered, and used in teas, infusions, or as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
